objective: Deliver competitive-grade Gen9 singles battle engine (excluding Terastallization)
guidingPrinciples: Data-model and battle-engine behavior must stay aligned
Every new mechanic requires deterministic tests
Prefer centralized helpers over scattered ability/item branches
No regressions on existing move and ability behavior tests

phaseDoneRules: All tasks in phase marked done
No new failing tests in full suite
releaseCandidateRules: Ability gap closed for top-meta singles abilities
No known high-severity switch-turn or immunity bugs

phases.title: Engine Stability and Determinism
phases.goal: Make turn resolution deterministic and safe for large mechanic rollout

tasks.title: Deterministic action ordering contract
tasks.description: Lock ordering for move priority, speed, tie-break, and Trick Room interaction in a single policy module.
acceptance: Order rules documented and unit-tested
No flaky ordering tests across 100 repeated runs

tasks.title: Turn-state lifecycle audit
tasks.description: Verify start-turn, action, faint, switch, end-turn transitions and state cleanup (encore/disable/yawn/nightmare/trap/etc.).
acceptance: No stale runtime state after switch/faint
State maps cleaned for fainted and switched-out Pokemon

tasks.title: Seedable RNG for replayable scenarios
tasks.description: Expose seed controls in battle session to reproduce misses, crits, multi-hit sequences, and confusion rolls.
acceptance: Same seed reproduces identical battle log
Different seed allows probabilistic divergence

tasks.title: Strict request validation for turn API
tasks.description: Harden --run-turn-json request schema and error messages for invalid move/item/switch selectors.
acceptance: Invalid inputs return stable machine-readable errors
No crash on malformed requests

phases.title: Status Move Coverage Sprint
phases.goal: Reduce unsupported status moves from 174 to <= 90

tasks.title: Hazard and hazard-control block
tasks.description: Complete Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Stealth Rock, Defog, Court Change, and interactions with grounded immunity and poison immunity.
acceptance: Entry hazards apply only on legal switch-in targets
Defog/Court Change update both sides correctly

tasks.title: Protection family block
tasks.description: Implement and unify Detect, Spiky Shield, King's Shield, Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Quick Guard, Wide Guard.
acceptance: Consecutive use penalty modeled consistently
Contact punish effects applied correctly

tasks.title: Recovery and delayed recovery block
tasks.description: Complete Rest, Roost, Shore Up, Moonlight, Morning Sun, Synthesis, Wish, Lunar Blessing, Life Dew, Heal Pulse.
acceptance: Healing caps at max HP
Weather/field dependent healing follows Gen9 singles behavior

tasks.title: Control and lock block
tasks.description: Implement Taunt, Torment, Imprison, Encore consistency, Disable consistency, Heal Block, Embargo, Gravity.
acceptance: Move selection restrictions enforced each turn
Mutual lock interactions are deterministic

tasks.title: Switch-manipulation block
tasks.description: Finalize Roar, Whirlwind, Dragon Tail style force-switch consistency and trap exceptions.
acceptance: Force-switch fails when target side has no bench
Substitute and trap interactions match singles expectations

tasks.title: Transform/copy/swap block
tasks.description: Harden Transform, Mimic, Sketch, Mirror Move, Copycat, Role Play, Skill Swap, Entrainment, Simple Beam, Doodle.
acceptance: No illegal move-slot corruption
Ability-copy rules reject banned/immutable abilities

phases.title: Ability Completion for Singles Meta
phases.goal: Close high-impact ability gap and keep routing centralized in Abilities helpers

tasks.title: Top-meta ability shortlist implementation
tasks.description: Implement missing high-impact singles abilities first (priority set: Good as Gold, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Supreme Overlord, Sharpness, Purifying Salt, Earth Eater, Well-Baked Body, Wind Rider, Toxic Debris, Lingering Aroma, Cud Chew).
acceptance: Each ability has helper/API route and behavior tests
No direct scattered branches added in Battle.cpp
tests: new ability behavior tests per ability

tasks.title: OnEntry/OnExit trigger parity
tasks.description: Audit all implemented trigger abilities for constructor-trigger, switch-trigger, and faint-trigger parity.
acceptance: No double-trigger on battle start
Switch in/out effects exactly once per legal transition

tasks.title: Ability immunity reason consistency
tasks.description: Standardize event reasons and messages for type/status immunity + heal-on-immune flows.
acceptance: All immunity events emit canonical reason
Type/status immunity and healing are data-driven

phases.title: Item System Expansion
phases.goal: Reduce unsupported JSON battle items from 152 to <= 80

tasks.title: Singles-critical held items block
tasks.description: Add missing competitive staples not covered in engine enum/factory and wire all trigger contexts (on-hit/on-damage/on-turn-end).
acceptance: Unsupported JSON battle items reduced by >= 40
Item trigger context includes move, damage, and effectiveness

tasks.title: Consumption and one-time-use correctness
tasks.description: Ensure berries and one-time items consume only when conditions are satisfied.
acceptance: No unconditional consumption in trigger execution
Reproducible activation boundaries at threshold HP

tasks.title: Item-move and item-ability interaction matrix
tasks.description: Add matrix tests for Knock Off, Unnerve, Magic Guard, and hazard/weather chip with held items.
acceptance: Known interactions validated in matrix suite
No regression in existing move/ability tests

phases.title: Damage Formula and Edge-Case Fidelity
phases.goal: Improve partial damaging moves and edge interactions

tasks.title: Partial damaging move audit
tasks.description: Promote high-use partial moves to implemented by adding missing special mechanics (multi-hit variants, fixed-damage, crash recoil, charge turn exceptions).
acceptance: At least 80 partial moves upgraded to implemented
All upgraded moves have dedicated tests

tasks.title: Targeting and immunity edge cases
tasks.description: Finalize interactions for foresight/miracle-eye, semi-invulnerable states, and weather/terrain modifiers.
acceptance: No contradictory immunity outcomes
Semi-invulnerable state checks are centralized

phases.title: Data Alignment and Tooling
phases.goal: Keep data files and engine implementation in sync continuously

tasks.title: Auto-generate gap reports in CI
tasks.description: Emit machine-readable reports for move/ability/item implementation gaps and fail CI on regressions.
acceptance: CI artifact includes gap JSON reports
Regression thresholds configurable
tests: CI dry run with baseline snapshot

tasks.title: Todo status updater script
tasks.description: Create script to update this ToDo.json progress using test outputs and matrix generators.
acceptance: Single command refreshes baseline metrics
Phase/task completion percentages auto-updated

tasks.title: Singles mechanics conformance checklist
tasks.description: Maintain explicit singles conformance checklist by mechanic group with links to tests.
acceptance: Checklist covers status, switch, hazard, weather, terrain, ability, item
Every checklist row references at least one test

rules: Each PR must include tests and gap-delta note

reviewChecklist: New ability/item checks are routed through centralized helpers
Move rule registration remains in Moves module
No duplicate switch-like logic across Battle and MoveEffectHandler
All new edge cases have at least one deterministic test

phaseDependencies.reason: Status control mechanics depend on deterministic queue/state lifecycle
Ability triggers and lock effects must share reliable runtime state transitions
Item-hazard and item-switch interactions rely on stable switch/hazard flow
Formula and immunity edge checks require finalized ordering and canonical immunity reasons

nextTwoWeeksSprintBoard.objective: Finish P0 foundations and land first high-impact status/mechanic deltas

dailyCadence.day1: Lock ordering contract and add tie-break tests
dailyCadence.day2: Audit runtime state maps and clear-on-switch/faint
dailyCadence.day3: Hazard stack behavior refactor and tests
dailyCadence.day4: Defog and Court Change side-effects coverage
dailyCadence.day6: Regression sweep and flaky test hunt

exitCriteria: Unsupported status moves reduced by at least 20
No increase in unsupported JSON battle items
No new failures in ctest run

progressLog.delta: Added protection-family consecutive-use penalty coverage, including cross-variant chaining behavior.
Expanded Heal Block regression coverage to immediate and delayed recovery interactions plus expiry unlock behavior.
Added Taunt expiry regression coverage to ensure status-move lock is enforced during duration and released correctly after timeout.
Added Torment expiry regression coverage to ensure same-move restriction is enforced during duration and released after timeout.
Added Disable expiry regression coverage to ensure locked-move restriction is enforced during duration and released after timeout.
Ran an automated plan audit by mapping ToDo task test names to current gtests. Most phases are functionally done-like by test coverage; primary uncovered gap is P3-T02 item-consumption edge tests.
validation: Gap identified: P3-T02 (berry-specific activation, Focus Sash/Weakness Policy edge cases)

riskRegister.risk: Move rule growth reintroduces scattered special-case branches
riskRegister.mitigation: Require helper APIs for ability/item checks; review Battle.cpp branch additions

riskRegister.risk: False confidence from parse-level tests without behavioral assertions
riskRegister.mitigation: Every implemented move/item/ability must include behavior-focused tests

riskRegister.risk: Data refresh changes IDs or names unexpectedly
riskRegister.mitigation: Keep fill-missing default and add compatibility checks for ids
